CVE-2018-10689.title: blktrace (aka Block IO Tracing) 1.2.0, as used with the Linux ker ...
CVE-2018-10689.description: blktrace (aka Block IO Tracing) 1.2.0, as used with the Linux kernel and Android, has a buffer overflow in the dev_map_read function in btt/devmap.c because the device and devno arrays are too small, as demonstrated by an invalid free when using the btt program with a crafted file.
